comment: Calculates Altman Z Score. Use BI_AltmanZScoreVariables() function to list the variables.
Lists out Altman Z Score Variables.
Calculates Anova (Analysis of Variance) Single Factor. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.
Calculates Anova (Analysis of Variance) without replication. This is one of the Data Analysis Toolpak features.

Shows AnsCombe Quartet. Anscombe's quartet is a group of four data sets that are nearly identical in simple descriptive statistics, but there are peculiarities that fool the regression model once you plot each data set.
Verifies whether one record of data contains in a table and returns true or false.
Counts howmany times a record of data repeated in a table of data. If not found returns 0.
Filters a Table for a multi-column criteria array by matching selected columns with the criteria array.
Filters only the available rows in an array found in another array.
Returns the row number of an array where a matching row is first found. Returns #NA if not found.
Returns the sorted array by all the columns  in the order entered. Useful for sorting Countrywise, Regionwise, Statewise, Citywise etc.,
Returns Attribute Unit Sampling cumulative count of any attribute.
Returns whether one text begins with another text.
Calculates Beneish M Score. Beneish's M-Score is a mathematical model that uses eight financial ratios weighted by coefficients to identify whether a company has manipulated its profits.
Lists out Beneish M Score variables to make it easy to enter two years data for calculating Beneish M Score.
